mapper.select: SELECT id AS prescriptionId, uuid, diagnosis, rp FROM doctor_prescription WHERE registration_id = #{registrationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor_prescription( uuid, patient_card_id, diagnosis, sub_dept_id, doctor_id, registration_id, rp ) VALUES ( #{uuid}, #{patientCardId}, #{diagnosis}, #{subDeptId}, #{doctorId}, #{registrationId}, #{rp} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE patient_card_id = VALUES(patient_card_id), diagnosis = VALUES(diagnosis), sub_dept_id = VALUES(sub_dept_id), doctor_id = VALUES(doctor_id), rp = VALUES(rp)
